
/****** Object:  Table [dbo].[EDI_CustomerUser]    Script Date: 10/22/2019 5:05:48 PM ******/
DROP TABLE [dbo].[EDI_CustomerUser]
GO





/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	CustomerId int NOT NULL,
	UserId int NOT NULL,
	ValidIntoTime datetime NOT NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF_EDI_CustomerUser_ValidIntoTime DEFAULT GETDATE() FOR ValidIntoTime
GO
SET IDENTITY_INSERT dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser ON
GO
IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM dbo.EDI_CustomerUser)
	 EXEC('INSERT INTO dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser (Id, CustomerId, UserId, ValidIntoTime)
		SELECT Id, CustomerId, UserId, ValidIntoTime FROM dbo.EDI_CustomerUser WITH (HOLDLOCK TABLOCKX)')
GO
SET IDENTITY_INSERT dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser OFF
GO
DROP TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
GO
EXECUTE sp_rename N'dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser', N'EDI_CustomerUser', 'OBJECT' 
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK_EDI_CustomerUser PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_EDI_CustomerUser ON dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	CustomerId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_EDI_CustomerUser_1 ON dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	UserId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 
























/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
	DROP CONSTRAINT DF_EDI_CustomerUser_ValidIntoTime
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	CustomerId int NOT NULL,
	UserId int NOT NULL,
	IsPrimary bit NOT NULL,
	ValidIntoTime datetime NOT NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF_EDI_CustomerUser_IsPrimary DEFAULT 0 FOR IsPrimary
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF_EDI_CustomerUser_ValidIntoTime DEFAULT (getdate()) FOR ValidIntoTime
GO
SET IDENTITY_INSERT dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser ON
GO
IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM dbo.EDI_CustomerUser)
	 EXEC('INSERT INTO dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser (Id, CustomerId, UserId, ValidIntoTime)
		SELECT Id, CustomerId, UserId, ValidIntoTime FROM dbo.EDI_CustomerUser WITH (HOLDLOCK TABLOCKX)')
GO
SET IDENTITY_INSERT dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser OFF
GO
DROP TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
GO
EXECUTE sp_rename N'dbo.Tmp_EDI_CustomerUser', N'EDI_CustomerUser', 'OBJECT' 
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK_EDI_CustomerUser PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_EDI_CustomerUser ON dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	CustomerId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_EDI_CustomerUser_1 ON dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	UserId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_EDI_CustomerUser_2 ON dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	IsPrimary
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 




















/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser ADD
	ValidFromTime datetime NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_EDI_CustomerUser_ValidFromTime DEFAULT (getdate())
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per
